betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ore Acidizer§f

§aVersatile fluid-based processing machine — multiply ore yields, produce crystalline fullerite, and unlock rare resources!§f

The §bOre Acidizer§f (also called the crystallizer or acidizer) is a powerful machine that processes items using various solvents. It requires §bDesh§f to craft, gating it at post-oil. It is essential for ore multiplication, crystalline fullerite production, and obtaining rare resources that cannot be obtained any other way.

§6Crafting§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• §e2×§f Welded Steel Plate
§b• §e3×§f Titanium Shell
§b• §e4×§f Desh Ingot
§b• §e1×§f Motor
§b• §e2×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Operation§f:
§b• Power§f: §e1 kHE/t§f base consumption. Recipes range from §e1–30 seconds§f (20 kHE to 600 kHE total).
§b• Fluid Tank§f: §e8,000 mB§f internal capacity.
§b• Energy Buffer§f: §e1 MHE§f.
§b• Ports§f: 8 total (2 per side) for fluids, energy, and item I/O.
§b• Upgrade Slots§f: 2 slots, supports Speed, Effectiveness, and Overdrive upgrades (up to level 3).

§6Key Recipes§f:
§b• Crystallizing Ores§f: 23 recipes for converting ores into crystalline form using various solvents.
§b• Crystalline Fullerite§f: §e4×§f Fullerene + §e1,000mB§f BTX.
§b• Desh§f: DeshReady™ Blend + Hydrogen Peroxide.
§b• Mercury§f: From Cinnabar or Redstone.
§b• Nether Quartz§f: Silicon Ingot + Oxygen.
§b• Boron§f: From Borax.
§b• Cordite§f: Sawdust + Nitroglycerin.
§b• Chemical Dyes§f: Wood Oil + various powders.
§b• Exclusive Resources§f: Cadmium, Crystalline Fullerite, and Arsenic can only be obtained from the Acidizer.

§eTip§f: The Acidizer's §eEffectiveness Upgrade§f gives a chance to not consume inputs — very valuable for expensive recipes like Crystalline Fullerite. The §eOverdrive Upgrade§f divides duration with no downside, making it strictly better than Speed upgrades!
